revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-215

No English Term

A filament (usually of multi-vee formation) in the form of a hollow truncated cone, generated around the axis of the lamp.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig30.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: The filament may be fully closed in plan, or may embrace an arc of less than 360 degrees.

In the latter case, the French term is Grille Tronconique Incomplete or Filament Tronconique Incomplet and the English term is"Bunch filament" (2-3-220).


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Hollow truncated cone filament}}
